title: brodiaea capitata var. insularis
intro: Brodiaea capitata var. insularis, also known as the island brodiaea, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the asparagaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of island brodiaea are attributed to its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of brodiaea capitata var. insularis typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas or applied topically as a salve.
